signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana reached an all-time high of **167 million monthly token holders** as of April 14, 2026, with daily non-vote transactions hitting historic highs of 148 million[1]. This represents a 12% year-on-year increase and marks SOL as the fourth-largest held L1 token[2]. However, this record ownership hasn't translated to price appreciati

signals.headline: Alpenglow Upgrade Aims for 150ms Transaction Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Aims for 150ms Transaction Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
The highly anticipated **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** is designed to slash transaction finality from 12 seconds to just 150 milliseconds[1], representing a major technical breakthrough for Solana's performance claims.

signals.headline: Bank-Issued Stablecoin Launches on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bank-Issued Stablecoin Launches on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
Societe Generale expanded access to its regulated USD stablecoin via Solana and Ethereum as of April 15, 2026[3], signaling institutional adoption and regulatory clarity.

signals.headline: Bitcoin Breaks Above $75K | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Breaks Above $75K | YES | HIGH confidence**
Bitcoin touched $75K on the daily timeframe, confirming a short-term uptrend, though it needs to clear $94-98K on the weekly timeframe to confirm a sustained bull market[7].

signals.headline: SOL Faces Technical Resistance at $86-$88 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SOL Faces Technical Resistance at $86-$88 | YES | HIGH confidence**
Technical analysis shows SOL stuck below a critical resistance band with repeated failed breakout attempts, creating a neutral-to-bearish near-term outlook[3].
